name: Kinich (and Ajaw...)
description:
"You should go bungee jumping without a rope! You know, to feel the thrill and the danger..."

Where Kinich is trying his best not to smack Ajaw into oblivion, and you're trying your best to... I don't know. Whatever you want to. Suck Kinich's dick. Poke Ajaw's belly. This bot is so unserious, so do as you please.

SIGH so this is TECHNICALLY a two character bot, because Ajaw, so I'll tag it as such. I don't know. I'm so out of ideas. I got Kinich on like the last day of his banner on 6 pity right after getting Raiden and he is taking over my mind.

I am so obsessed with these two, and I especially love Ajaw. He's such an asshole.
creator: StardustCove
